description:
The Warlock is a Guardian class in Destiny that specializes in combining magic powers granted by The Traveler with modern weapons.

Warlocks have long studied The Traveler, which gives rise to their ability to harness some of its powers. As the Warlocks advance through levels, their arcane powers grow stronger.

In appearance, Warlocks can be distinguished by their rounded helmets and long vestments. As with the other player classes, in addition to head, chest armor, gauntlets, and leg armor, they have a special fifth armor slot that is unique to their class and further helps to distinguish them from their brethren in arms: a bond (armband) worn on the upper-left arm.

void.name: Voidwalker
void.description: Voidwalker focuses on the manipulation and use of Void energy to obliterate enemies. It has been described by Bungie as a glass cannon, offering a strong offense but taking away from defense. This is also the starter subclass for warlock.

first.name: Vortex Grenade
first.description: A grenade that creates a vortex which continually damages enemies inside the sphere.

second.name: Scatter Grenade
second.description: A grenade that splits into many submunitions and covers a large area with explosions.

third.name: Axion Bolt
third.description: A bolt of Void light which forks into smaller bolts on impact which seek toward enemies.

movement.name: Glide
movement.description: Double jump in mid-air to activate Glide.

first.name: Focused Control
first.description: Upgrades Glide for better directional control while in mid-air.

second.name: Focused Burst
second.description: Upgrades Glide to provide an initial burst of speed.

third.name: Blink
third.description: A short distance teleport that replaces Glide.

super.name: Nova Bomb
super.description: Hurl an explosive bolt of Void light at the enemy, disintegrating those caught within its blast.

first.name: Vortex
first.description: Nova Bomb creates a vortex which continually damages enemies trapped inside. Lasts 3.5 seconds.

second.name: Shatter
second.description: Nova Bomb splits into three projectiles.

third.name: Lance
third.description: Nova Bomb travels farther and faster, and does more damage.

melee.name: Energy Drain
melee.description: A powerful melee attack which drains energy from enemies and uses it to reduce the cooldown of your grenade.

first.name: Surge
first.description: Damaging an enemy with Energy Drain increases your weapon and movement speed.

second.name: Life Steal
second.description: Damaging an enemy with Energy Drain immediately restores a significant portion of your health.

third.name: Soul Rip
third.description: Damaging an enemy with Energy Drain reduces the cooldown of Nova Bomb.

first.name: Arcane Wisdom
first.description: Training focused on battle recovery and speed.

second.name: Arcane Spirit
second.description: Training focused on battle recovery and toughness.

third.name: Arcane Force
third.description: Training focused on toughness and speed.

first.name: Annihilate
first.description: Increases the size of the explosion created by Nova Bomb and Vortex grenade.

second.name: Angry Magic
second.description: Nova Bomb tracks enemies.

third.name: The Hunger
third.description: Increases the duration of the Energy Drain effect.

first.name: Ancestral Order
first.description: Training focused on all attributes.

second.name: Chaos Order
second.description: Training focused on raw speed.

third.name: Divine Order
third.description: Training focused on toughness at all costs.

first.name: Vortex Mastery
first.description: Increases the range of Axion Bolt seekers and the duration of the Vortex effect of Nova Bomb and Vortex Grenade.

second.name: Bloom
second.description: Enemies killed with any of your abilities explode.

third.name: Embrace the Void
third.description: Killing enemies with Nova Bomb or any grenade triggers the Energy Drain effect.

solar.name: Sunsinger
solar.description: Sunsinger's super ability, Radiance, allows the player to deal more area damage by reducing the cooldown of grenades while active. Radiance's modifiers can allow a player to revive themselves after death, reduce incoming damage or reduce the cooldowns of a fireteam while active. Sunsinger subclass is unlocked when any of a player's characters reach level 15.

first.name: Solar Grenade
first.description: A grenade that creates a flare of Solar Light which continually damages enemies trapped inside.

second.name: Firebolt Grenade
second.description: A grenade that unleashes bolts of Solar Light at nearby enemies.

third.name: Fusion Grenade
third.description: A grenade that causes bonus damage when attached to its target.

movement.name: Glide
movement.description: Double jump in mid-air to activate Glide.

first.name: Focused Control
first.description: Upgrades Glide for better directional control while in mid-air.

second.name: Focused Burst
second.description: Upgrades Glide to provide an initial burst of speed.

third.name: Balanced Glide
third.description: Upgrades Glide to provide bonuses to both speed and control.

super.name: Radiance
super.description: Fill yourself with Solar light, dramatically increasing the effectiveness of all your abilities.

first.name: Song of Flame
first.description: While active, Radiance reduces all cooldowns for nearby allies.

second.name: Radiant Skin
second.description: While active, Radiance reduces incoming damage.

third.name: Fireborn
third.description: Radiance can now be activated from beyond the grave. Doing so returns you to life.

melee.name: Scorch
melee.description: A powerful melee attack that ignites enemies, causing damage over time.

first.name: Flame Shield
first.description: Damaging enemies with Scorch reduces incoming damage for a short time.

second.name: Solar Wind
second.description: Reduces the cooldown of Scorch. Hitting an enemy with Scorch knocks them back.

third.name: Brimstone
third.description: Reduces the cooldown of Scorch. Killing enemies with Scorch causes them to explode.

first.name: Arcane Wisdom
first.description: Training focused on battle recovery and speed.

second.name: Arcane Spirit
second.description: Training focused on battle recovery and toughness.

third.name: Arcane Force
third.description: Training focused on toughness and speed.

first.name: Radiant Will
first.description: Increases the duration of Radiance.

second.name: Viking Funeral
second.description: Enemies you ignite burn take more damage from all sources. Stacks up to 3 times.

third.name: Sunburst
third.description: Killing an enemy with Scorch generates an Orb of Light.

first.name: Ancestral Order
first.description: Training focused on all attributes.

second.name: Chaos Order
second.description: Training focused on raw speed.

third.name: Divine Order
third.description: Training focused on toughness at all costs.

first.name: Touch of Flame
first.description: All grenades ignite enemies, causing damage over time.

second.name: Angel of Light
second.description: Aiming your weapon while in the air will hold you in place for a short time.

third.name: Gift of the Sun
third.description: Gain an additional grenade.

arc.name: Stormcaller
arc.description: Stormcallers directly manipulate Arc energy, focusing body and mind to channel and chain the lightning. Their enemies are given fair warning— flee from battle, or face the storm. This subclass can be obtained when doing the level 26 mission `Phobos`.

first.name: Pulse Grenade
first.description: A grenade that periodically damages enemies inside its explosive radius.

second.name: Storm Grenade
second.description: This grenade calls down a localized lightning storm.

third.name: Arcbolt
third.description: A grenade that chains bolts of lightning to nearby enemies.

movement.name: Glide
movement.description: Double jump in mid-air to activate Glide.

first.name: Focused Control
first.description: Upgrades Glide for better directional control while in mid-air.

second.name: Focused Burst
second.description: Upgrades Glide to provide an initial burst of speed.

third.name: Balanced Glide
third.description: Upgrades Glide to provide bonuses to both speed and control.

super.name: Stormtrance
super.description: Fire Arc lightning from your hands.

first.name: Landfall
first.description: On casting Stormtrance, fire a bolt of lightning into the ground, creating a devastating shockwave under you.

second.name: Superconductor
second.description: Doubles your Stormtrance lightning's chaining capabilities.

third.name: Ionic Blink
third.description: Press L3 to teleport during Stormtrance.

melee.name: Thunderstrike
melee.description: Deliver an electrocuting melee strike to close-range targets.

first.name: Chain Lighting
first.description: Your Thunderstrike chains from the struck target to another nearby enemy.

second.name: Amplitude
second.description: Your Thunderstrike has a greater range.

third.name: Rising Storm
third.description: Hits with Thunderstrike charge your Super Ability and Melee energy.

first.name: Arcane Wisdom
first.description: Training focused on battle recovery and speed.

second.name: Arcane Spirit
second.description: Training focused on battle recovery and toughness.

third.name: Arcane Force
third.description: Training focused on toughness and speed.

first.name: Pulse Wave
first.description: When critically wounded, trigger a Pulsewave that boosts speed for you and your allies.

second.name: Feedback
second.description: Incoming melee attacks fully recharge and intensify your Thunderstrike.

third.name: Transcendence
third.description: When cast with full grenade and melee energy, Stormtrance restores your health to full and drains slower.

first.name: Ancestral Order
first.description: Training focused on all attributes.

second.name: Chaos Order
second.description: Training focused on raw speed.

third.name: Divine Order
third.description: Training focused on toughness at all costs.

first.name: Electrostatic Mind
first.description: Stormtrance charges faster when allies are near. When Stormtrance is active, nearby enemies take damage.

second.name: Arc Web
second.description: Enemies damaged by your grenades chain deadly lightning to other nearby enemies.

third.name: Perpetuai Charge
third.description: Getting a grenade kill recharges your melee. Getting a melee kill recharges your grenade.
